steps.assistant_text: 4th sibling of the FP pool-coloring family (BB88/C1B4/CC74): stores c(0x114), d(0x110), if(!d){}, b(0x10C), if(b){}, a(0x118) — c,d single-BB color from pool start (d bumped to f0 by branch use, c f2); empty-if boundaries globalize b->f12, a->f14 from pool end; scheduler re-emits stores in load order.

metadata.verification: objdiff fuzzy=100.0 + make verify ROM byte-identical
